title: World Atlas (v1)
description: The world overview rendered when a player READs a World Atlas item: a single hand-drawn ASCII graph of every area and how they connect. Holds no rooms and no player position (issue #529). Lives at data/areas/atlas.json.

id.description: Matches the map_area_id of the World Atlas item (conventionally 'atlas').

ascii_map.description: Hand-authored overview art, one string per line, showing area names and their connections. Must never contain a player-position marker (no '@').
